steps.t: Bert Bartleby is by the stables in the town of Forlaw, in Wildermore. Bingo told you that Bert Bartleby wanted to have a word with you.
The lore-master was last seen near the west-gate of Forlaw. Bert Bartleby asked you to find the lore-master that came to Forlaw and buy some potions a…
One of the guards at the west gate of Forlaw has called you over to him.
Bert Bartleby is near the stables of Forlaw, in Wildermore.
Humfrey Rumming set out from Forlaw heading west, and Bert Bartleby has asked you to track him down.
Humfrey Rumming is at the abandoned town of Dunfast, in Wildermore.
Bert Bartleby is by the stables in the town of Forlaw, in Wildermore. Humfrey took the money-purse given to you by Bert Bartleby and traded you some v…
Bingo is in the town of Forlaw, west of the Forlaw Feasting Hall.
